channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Violence and natural disasters dominate global headlines, with significant incidents reported in Cyprus, Norway, the US, and the Middle East.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: The US labor market shows signs of distress with a significant job loss in February, coinciding with rising oil prices and ongoing tariff disputes.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: The technology landscape is buzzing with new product announcements, dynamic pricing experiments, and innovative gaming experiences.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: NFL free agency buzz intensifies as teams prepare for significant player movements, while college basketball and international baseball also capture headlines.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a new nuclear physics finding, insights into autism, and the impact of seabird guano on ancient Peruvian agriculture.
